user.title: Connect to Tempo
user.description: Enter your Tempo API token. Get it from **Tempo → Settings → API Integration → New Token**.

data.min_hours: Minimum hours to count as logged

data_description.base_url: Leave default unless you use a self-hosted Tempo instance
data_description.min_hours: Days with fewer hours than this will show as not logged (default: 4)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Tempo API. Check the URL and your network.
error.invalid_token: Invalid API token. Please check it in Tempo → Settings → API Integration.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.
